gitCommit.subject: chore: update Playwright JSON output configuration in CI workflow
gitCommit.body: chore: update Playwright JSON output configuration in CI workflow

specs.title: Recently viewed panel shows empty state before any patient or form is visited

Recently viewed Forms tab shows form card with details and navigates on click
Recently viewed list is capped at 10 most recent items in reverse chronological order
Navigating to a form from a task grid records the patient and form in recently viewed
New patient appears in recently viewed only after primary form is saved with conformant data
Recently viewed list is scoped to the active user role
Patient-level quick access shows recently viewed patients and forms with Documents option
